headline: Allegion (ALLE) Shifts Focus Toward Electronic Security Solutions
summary: Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) ranks among the oversold European stocks to buy. On March 18, Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) presented its strategy at the JPMorgan Industrials Conference 2026, emphasizing its shift toward security solutions based on electronics and software. The company generates over $4 billion in revenue, with solid 25% EBITDA margins, with its electronics segment now […]
